title: Contact
heading: Contact Us
intro: Whether you need app support, want to share feedback, are interested in testing upcoming releases, or would like to discuss a project, we'd love to hear from you.

hero.alt: Professional workspace inviting project discussions and contact with BarkinMad Studios

sections.heading: Support
paragraphs: Need help with one of our apps or games? Email us at support@barkinmad.studio and we'll do our best to help.
To help us investigate your issue more quickly, please include the app name, your device model, iOS version, and a brief description of the problem.
For accessibility information or to report an accessibility problem, visit our [Accessibility](/accessibility) page.

sections.heading: Feedback
paragraphs: We're always interested in hearing your thoughts about our apps and games, including [ZXSnake](/apps/zxsnake), [ZXBrick](/apps/zxbrick), [ZXSpace](/apps/zxspace), [ZXPong](/apps/zxpong), and [The Game of Darts](/apps/gameofdarts).
Suggestions, bug reports, gameplay ideas, and feature requests all help shape future updates and improvements.

sections.heading: Testing
paragraphs: From time to time, we invite players to test upcoming apps, games, and new features before they're released to the public.
If you'd like to register your interest in future iPhone or iPad beta testing, simply get in touch by email.

sections.heading: Business Enquiries
paragraphs: For business enquiries, collaboration opportunities, custom software projects, or general questions, please contact us at support@barkinmad.studio.
